posts.caption: Earlier today in Paris, designer Pierpaolo Piccioli unveiled his first-ever fall 2026 couture collection for Balenciaga. And while Piccioli’s couture clothing delivered plenty of interesting offerings, all eyes were set on the label’s couture-ified City bags that were carried down the catwalk. Piccioli’s take on the classic City? Covering it in shimmering crystals. Get all the details on the couture version of the beloved Y2K staple at the link in bio. Backstage photographed by @styledumonde
posts.alt_text: This afternoon in Paris, @duranlantinkyo made his couture debut for @JeanPaulGaultier. The event marks the first standalone couture presentation for the brand since the collaborative guest designer shows over the course of the last few year’s. Similarly, however, Duran’s inaugural presentation blended his two worlds: the campy, but fine-tuned tailoring of his own codes and some signature JPG deep-cuts including silver armor and body-bending silhouettes. Tap the link in bio to see all of the looks.

posts.caption: Ready, set, draw! Once again, the dream team of Jacky Marshall (@jackyblue__)and @bluefarrier have picked up their brushes—and cameras—to document the couture and their processes for Vogue Runway. First up for fall 2026: @Schiaparelli and @IrisvanHepen, houses at which material exploration was pushed to new limits. Said Daniel Roseberry who used silicone in his Schiaparelli collection: “It was a total surrender to an unknown creative process, even on the materialization.” Iris van Herpen became the first designer on record to create a garment using plasma; in so doing, Amy Verner reported, she “has now proven that the immaterial can be material.”

posts.caption: #HauteCoutureWeek, day two: From @Matthieu_Blazy’s @ChanelOfficial fairytale to @AlexisMabille’s transformative collection, plus @GiorgioArmani Privé’s star-studded front row, here’s what you don’t want to miss from the second day of Paris Couture.
posts.alt_text: Size inclusivity in menswear remains largely static across #MilanFashionWeek and #ParisFashionWeek, with this season also welcoming more polarized body ideals. Alongside the continued dominance of straight-size casting, there was a sharp focus on extreme physiques, from "protein chic" and hyper-muscular builds shaped by looksmaxxing, to the return of ultra-slim "slender man" silhouettes. We found that of the thousands of looks presented across Milan and Paris SS27 shows, only 0.2% were shown on plus-size models, remaining unchanged since FW26. Tap the link in bio for a break down of the full report.

posts.caption: Dear unbelieving neighbour who is reading this now, whether you are a man or a woman, a Jew or a Gentile: Are you a good person? Not according to your own opinion, but according to the holy Law of God, your sovereign Creator and righteous Judge (Romans 3:10–20). No one is, for all have sinned and fall short of the glory of God (Romans 3:23). Truly repent, confess your sins to God, and believe by faith alone in the Lord Jesus Christ, crucified and risen, who is the only Savior and Mediator between the holy God and sinful humanity (Romans 10:9–13; Ephesians 2:8–9). Only then, by sovereign grace, will you be freely justified, reconciled to God, delivered from God’s eternal wrath in hell, and empowered by the Holy Spirit to live a life of holiness and good works pleasing to God, living for His eternal glory (Ephesians 2:10; James 2:26; Romans 5:1; 8:1). “Therefore, we are ambassadors for Christ, as though God were making His appeal through us; we implore you on behalf of Christ, be reconciled to God. He made Him who knew no sin to be sin for us, so that in Him we might become the righteousness of God” (2 Corinthians 5:20–21). I lovingly invite you, in Christ, to reflect on this message by watching this short video: https://youtu.be/pYZw0dfLmLk
posts.alt_text: Earlier today in Paris, designer Pierpaolo Piccioli unveiled his first-ever fall 2026 couture collection for Balenciaga. And while Piccioli’s couture clothing delivered plenty of interesting offerings, all eyes were set on the label’s couture-ified City bags that were carried down the catwalk. Piccioli’s take on the classic City? Covering it in shimmering crystals. Get all the details on the couture version of the beloved Y2K staple at the link in bio. Backstage photographed by @styledumonde

posts.caption: @Matthieu_Blazy sees Gabrielle Chanel’s career as a fairytale—this was the theme of his second haute couture show—but maybe that’s because his is, too. Swipe through for the scene at the Grand Palais for this morning’s show and then tap the link in bio to see every look.

posts.alt_text:
KAVITAON KA SILSILA AA RAHA HAI @sohotheatre LONDON. 💌🫀

They say everything iconic has once happened at SOHO (@sohotheatre ). The thought that Rajkumari will now be counted among the stories told on that stage still doesn’t feel real.

It’s strange… I can often find words for emotions people have buried deep within them, but when it comes to this show~my own, I always fall short.

Rajkumari has changed my life in ways I don’t think I’ll ever fully be able to put into poetry.

The last time we were in London, we promised we’d return bigger and better.

We kept that promise.

This is our biggest London show yet, and I’d love for you to be in the room with us, to laugh, cry, heal, and become a part of this chapter.

Tickets are in my bio. See you at Soho. 🔗🤍

@tarashna.management @beacon.live

posts.caption:
✨ Creator, Actor, PHENOMENON! ✨ On the June-July cover of Wedding Vows, we present the trailblazing @mostlysane, Prajakta Koli!
From building a YouTube empire to being the lead for Netflix Original Mismatched, from being part of Michelle Obama’s Day Time Emmy winning docu-series to being UNDP India's First Youth Climate Champion, her journey is nothing short of extraordinary.
With her debut romance novel set to launch this year, along with her first Amazon Prime Original Andhera, Prajakta’s journey is a testament to the power of dreams, hard work, and staying true to oneself. She continues to inspire millions with her authenticity, relatability, and unstoppable spirit.

posts.caption:
Rahul Mishra @rahulmishra_7 presented ‘Devi’ at Haute Couture Week, Paris. Drawing inspiration from ancient South Indian sculptures and the divine feminine, the collection was an absolute showstopper.
The lineup effortlessly transformed featherlight fabrics into breathtaking, structured silhouettes. By blending traditional artistry like intricate hand embroidery, zardozi, and dabka with modern design; Mishra beautifully celebrated India's rich artisanal heritage. The collection's contemporary edge was further elevated through brilliant collaborations with clay artisan Sumant Kumar, legendary milliner Stephen Jones, and Tanishq Natural Diamonds, seamlessly breathing new life into centuries-old craftsmanship.
Jewellery by @tanishqjewellery
Visit www.weddingvows.com for latest updates in wedding trends, region based vendors and bridal inspiration.
#weddingvowsmagazine #cardiB #ishaambani #rahulmishra #taylor

posts.caption:
For Fall/Winter 2027/28, @Reda1865 brings to Milano Unica a new vision of wool: essential, lasting and conscious.
Between formalwear and leisure, Reda 1865 and Reda Active come together through a contemporary language made of material excellence, movement, comfort and functionality.
From Passport, the traveller fabric designed for contemporary mobility, to MORPHO – Reda by Dinamo Contemporary Fabrics, the collection explores new expressive possibilities for wool, where textile tradition meets innovation.
Discover Reda’s Fall/Winter 2027/28 textile collection on WWD.
#Reda #TextileInnovation #MadeInItaly #MilanoUnica

posts.caption:
From sparkling City Bags to personalized invites, swipe to discover @lilychee’s firsthand experience at @pppiccioli’s breathtaking couture debut for @balenciaga today in Paris.
The sheer artistry of @pppiccioli is just incredible to witness. I’m so lucky to attend today’s show, especially as it marks his first couture show for the house.
I’m really happy with my look. I feel like it’s very elegant for this morning’s show. It’s sexy but elevated.
Finishing touches!
This sparkling City Bag is everything, and I need one immediately.
The colors, textures, and details—feathers, ombré cream whites into pink, sparkles, lace, sheer fabrics, etc.—were delectable to witness.
The casting of the models is always amazing. I feel like all of the colors are brought to life through the variety of skin tones.
I love the personalized invite. It makes such a lovely keepsake.
Cooling down with my seatmate, Mika. She’s the cutest, and I love sitting next to people I know.
It was amazing to be backstage and see the mood boards and sketches after the show. I feel like I saw the whole vision come to life.
Thank you so much for following along with me! Until next time. xx

posts.caption:
If anyone questions the power of an inner-corner highlight, show them these photos. Along with @zendaya’s hot-off-the-Paris-runway sculpted @schiaparelli gown, the star wore a makeup look worthy of a real-life Athena.
“I wanted to give Zendaya a bronzed, sun-kissed, and radiant complexion worthy of a glowing Greek goddess,” celebrity makeup artist @ernestocasillas said in a press release. “I created light, mesmerizing eyes to echo the ethereal elegance of the dress.”
For the exact product breakdown Casillas used—including that impossible-to-miss inner-corner sheen—head to the link in our bio.
photos: @ernestocasillas
